title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates building AI agents using the open-source Strands Agents SDK. The video covers agent fundamentals through a loop pattern, showing four progressively complex agent implementations from single-tool calculators to multi-agent orchestrators.
